title: Eighties icon admits to using AI in songwriting process
description: Boy George has admitted to embracing artificial intelligence as a songwriting tool. The Culture Club star, 64, delved into his writing process in a new episode of Fearne Cotton’s podcast Happy Place. Speaking to the author, George said: “Practice has really helped me as the lyricist, plus A.I. You're not working with anyone else, you don't have to worry even for two seconds about what they think. “I’m a top-line writer... all the people I work with... they send me tracks, and I'll just sit with them and do what I need to do, and I'll just play it and play it. I have fantastic conversations with ChatGPT, and I'll say oh, that’s crap. That's not what I would say.”
content:
Boy George has admitted to embracing artificial intelligence as a songwriting tool.
The Culture Club star, 64, delved into his writing process in a new episode of Fearne Cotton’s podcast Happy Place.

title: Economists doubt Trump plan for Fed pick, AI to deliver a '90s boom
description: Trump, his Treasury secretary and his choice to lead the Federal Reserve believe they can coax the U.S. economy into partying like it’s 1999. They are putting their faith in artificial intelligence to duplicate what happened when another technology arrived in the 1990s: the internet.
content:
By PAUL WISEMAN, AP Economics Writer
WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump, his Treasury secretary and his choice to lead the Federal Reserve believe they can coax the U.S. economy into partying like it’s 1999.
